items.claim: Farid Basharat is undefeated with a 15-0 record.
John Garza is taking the fight against Farid Basharat on four days' notice.
items.quote: You don't beat Farid Farid Basharat on four days notice.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has won all but one of his UFC fights by knockout.
items.quote: All of his wins in the UFC except for one are by KO

items.claim: Adrian Yanez's knockouts in the UFC have almost all occurred in the first round.
items.quote: all of these knockouts coming in the first round except for one if I'm not mistaken.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has not been knocked out at 135 lbs since 2019.
items.quote: Last guy to knock out Cody at 135 is Pedro Munhoz back in 2019

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt's performance in his recent fight against Long Xiao was poor enough that he arguably lost every round.
items.quote: you could argue Garbrandt lost every single round in the fight
